Hi Sandra! How do you usually start your day?
I wake up early and I commute to work by train.
That sounds busy. Do you have much spare time?
I hardly ever do, because I manage a team.
And what are you doing nowadays in your free time?
Right now I am learning English, and I am loving it!

In my spare time I run a few errands.

Hi, I am Sofia, and I want to tell you about my daily routine. I work in an office downtown, so every morning I commute by train for about forty minutes. I usually start work at nine. Nowadays I manage a small team, so my schedule is quite busy. During the week I hardly ever have free time, but on weekends I always run a few errands and then relax. In my spare time, I love reading and cooking. Right now, actually, I am learning to make Italian food, and I am really enjoying it.

My name is Thomas, and life is a little different for me nowadays. I work from home, so I do not commute anymore, and I love it. My routine is more flexible. I usually wake up early and check my schedule for the day. I hardly ever take a break in the morning because I prefer to finish my work first. In the afternoon I run my errands and manage the house. These days I am also studying for an exam, so in my spare time I am reading a lot. It is a busy period, but I am happy.

Let me tell you about Sandra's typical morning. First, she wakes up and checks her schedule. Then, she commutes to work by train. After that, she manages her team at the office. Finally, in the evening, she runs a few errands before she relaxes.
